data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for payment terms (Net-15, Net-30, upon completion). However, while the linked use case mentions that payment is scheduled Net-15, it does not provide sufficient evidence of the system's ability to handle multiple payment terms or confirm the implementation of all specified terms. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks to validate this requirement indicates a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: Payment terms (Net-15, Net-30, upon completion) are not fully validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for payment terms validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system supports and can validate multiple payment terms including Net-15, Net-30, and upon completion.
